message:
bd-w5vn5: add interactive node navigation + edge highlighting to mermaid showcase

Wire up the selection/navigation API from mermaid_render (IndigoCove's work)
into the showcase screen. Adds:
- Arrow key navigation between connected nodes in Inspect mode
- Tab/S-Tab for sequential node cycling
- Selection overlay highlighting (selected node + connected edges)
- Node detail panel showing label, shape, edges, cluster membership
- Cache invalidation for selection state changes
- Adjacency list rebuilt on layout change
- Help entries for new keybindings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
